title: taraxacum cyprium
intro: Taraxacum cyprium, also known as Cypriot dandelion, is a perennial plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. Traditionally, Taraxacum cyprium has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to stimulate digestion. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving liver function, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum cyprium is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
